description: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is a 'ndrina (criminal family) of the 'Ndrangheta, based in Petilia Policastro and Mesoraca, Crotone, Italy. It is involved in arms and drug trafficking, money laundering in tourism and real estate, and has operations in Sardinia, Lombardy, Abruzzo, Molise, Switzerland, and Spain. The group has alliances with other 'ndrine in the Catanzaro area and has been active since at least the 1960s.

country_links.evidence_quote: all'estero è attiva in Svizzera e Spagna
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is active in Spain.

country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Ferrazzo is active in Switzerland, involved in money laundering and arms trafficking.
